title: Guess colourGame
description: A color-space recognition game where players match a target RGB/HEX value against procedurally generated swatches, with proximity-offset hard mode, streak tracking, and localStorage best-score persistence.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Dual-format target display: real-time switch between rgb(r,g,b) and #rrggbb string formats via format toggle buttons without resetting round state
Procedural color seeding: rand255() for each channel, decoys randomized independently in Easy mode or within ±20 proximity per channel in Hard mode
Fisher-Yates swatch shuffle: correct answer seeded at index 0 then shuffled into random position among decoys on every round
Exploit-safe input lock: locked boolean flag set on correct guess blocks all further click evaluations until next round or reset
Incorrect fade penalty: wrong swatch receives .fade class (opacity 0, pointer-events none, scale 0.8) with CSS transition, streak zeroed
Correct reveal cascade: all swatches transition to target colour via .revealAll class, target gets .reveal (cyan glow), targetPanel gets @keyframes pulseGlow emerald ring animation
Streak-best persistence: localStorage gcBest key updated on every correct guess if streak exceeds stored value, read on boot
Easy/Hard grid: Easy 3 swatches (random), Hard 6 swatches (proximity offsets), grid-template-columns repeat(3,1fr) with dynamic swatchCount
